caption: A man with grey, spiked hair wears glasses, a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders, and a small red bow tie. He is seated in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall behind him, alongside clothing items on hangers and a white storage bin. He wears large black headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. On the left side of the screen, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and a similar logo appearing on the right says "BOSS TALK 101." Across the sequence, the man remains in a static position, though his mouth moves as he speaks, and he slightly shifts his head and gaze. The background and equipment remain stationary throughout the clip.
